plugins.name: paideia
plugins.description: Exam-prep workspace for math/physics courses, Codex-native. 14 skills + a bundled stdio MCP server (paideia-mcp) that owns parallel vision ingest, OCR (codex-native via Codex CLI's bundled vision / Qwen3-VL / Tesseract), strategy-grading, and phase detection. All artifacts are plain markdown.
